mapper.select:
SELECT user_oid , user_nm_korn , user_id , use_yn , prvc_use_yn FROM ${schema}.user
user_authrt = 'ADMIN' AND use_yn = 'Y'
AND ( user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR user_nm_korn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND use_yn = #{useYn}

SELECT a.menu_oid , a.menu_nm , a.menu_cd , a.up_menu_oid , a.menu_lv , a.menu_seq , b.auth_bgng_dt , b.auth_end_dt , a.use_yn , b.inq_authrt_yn FROM ${schema}.menu a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT b.menu_oid , b.inq_authrt_yn , IF( b.use_yn = 'Y', b.auth_bgng_dt, NULL) AS auth_bgng_dt , IF( b.use_yn = 'Y', b.auth_end_dt, NULL) AS auth_end_dt FROM ${schema}.user_menu_authrt b INNER JOIN ${schema}.user c ON b.user_oid = c.user_oid WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ) b ON a.menu_oid = b.menu_oid WHERE a.use_yn = 'Y' AND a.menu_auth_lv = 'ADMIN'

SELECT user_menu_authrt_oid , user_oid , menu_oid , use_yn , inq_authrt_yn , wrt_authrt_yn , del_authrt_yn , excel_authrt_yn , otpt_authrt_yn , auth_bgng_dt , auth_end_dt , reg_id , reg_dt , mdfcn_id , mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.user_menu_authrt WHERE user_oid = #{userOid} AND menu_oid = #{menuOid}

SELECT user_menu_authrt_oid , user_oid , menu_oid , use_yn , inq_authrt_yn , wrt_authrt_yn , del_authrt_yn , excel_authrt_yn , otpt_authrt_yn , auth_bgng_dt , auth_end_dt , reg_id , reg_dt , mdfcn_id , mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.user_menu_authrt WHERE user_oid = #{userOid}

SELECT user_menu_authrt_oid , user_oid , menu_oid , use_yn , inq_authrt_yn , wrt_authrt_yn , del_authrt_yn , excel_authrt_yn , otpt_authrt_yn , auth_bgng_dt , auth_end_dt , reg_id , reg_dt , mdfcn_id , mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.user_menu_authrt WHERE auth_end_dt < NOW() AND use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE ${schema}.user_menu_authrt SET use_yn = 'N' , inq_authrt_yn = 'N' , wrt_authrt_yn = 'N' , del_authrt_yn = 'N' , excel_authrt_yn = 'N' , otpt_authrt_yn = 'N' , mdfcn_id = 'SYSTEM' , mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE auth_end_dt < NOW() AND use_yn = 'Y'
